lead_with_contradiction: Prior file was on 21-May data; CONSOFINVT has since moved 227.85 -> 234.29 (+2.83pct). Score_5pct softened 0.87 -> 0.58 because near-term overshoot already partly realized. Score_15pct and score_30pct unchanged.
